title: Call: APA Panels 2026
subject: SAGP | APA Panels 2026
rich_html:
SAGP invites paper submissions for Society-sponsored panels at the American Philosophical Association meetings.
🏛️
SAGP
Society for Ancient Greek Philosophy

Call for Papers

APA Panels 2026

Submit your work for consideration for SAGP panels at APA meetings.

SAGP invites paper submissions for Society-sponsored panels at the American Philosophical Association meetings.

Deadlines

Eastern APA July 1, 2026
Extended deadline
Central APA August 1, 2026
Pacific APA August 1, 2026

Submission

Email submissions to Betsy Jelinek .

  • Include your name.
  • Include your academic affiliation.
  • Include the title of your paper.
  • Specify Eastern, Central, or Pacific APA.
  • Include the month and year in which you last paid SAGP membership dues.
  • Attach the paper prepared for blind review.
Attachments should be prepared for blind review and submitted as .docx, .rtf, .pdf.

Maximum length: 3000 words, including footnotes and bibliography.

Submissions of 1000 words or fewer are generally too short to be evaluated effectively.

Submit by email

Society for Ancient Greek Philosophy
societyforancientgreekphilosophy.org

Visit the Society website for upcoming events, calls, membership information, and Society activities.
plain_text:
====================================================

SAGP
Society for Ancient Greek Philosophy

====================================================

CALL FOR PAPERS

APA Panels 2026

SAGP invites paper submissions for Society-sponsored panels at the American Philosophical Association meetings.


Deadlines:
- Eastern APA: July 1, 2026 (Extended deadline)
- Central APA: August 1, 2026
- Pacific APA: August 1, 2026

Submission:
Email submissions to Betsy Jelinek at elizabeth.jelinek@cnu.edu.

Please include:
- Include your name.
- Include your academic affiliation.
- Include the title of your paper.
- Specify Eastern, Central, or Pacific APA.
- Include the month and year in which you last paid SAGP membership dues.
- Attach the paper prepared for blind review.

Attachment:
Blind-review paper in .docx, .rtf, .pdf format.
Maximum length: 3000 words.

Submissions of 1000 words or fewer are generally too short to be evaluated effectively.


====================================================

Society for Ancient Greek Philosophy
https://societyforancientgreekphilosophy.org
